identifier.raw:
([SharePoint Columns].[Workflow Status] == "Pending") 
|| 
(!(contains([SharePoint Columns].[Workflow Status], "Draft") || isMemberOfGroup("Service Rework Admin Test")))

rules.name: Hide "Other Root Cause" field in Rework Repair
Hide "Other root cause" field in Stock Destroyed
Hide "Other Root Cause" field in Service Courtesy

Hide "Other Root Cause" field in Expense General

identifier.raw: ([SharePoint Columns].[Workflow Status] == "Pending") || not(contains([SharePoint Columns].[Workflow Status], "Draft") || isMemberOfGroup("Service Rework Admin Test"))

not(
  isMemberOfGroup("Service Rework Admin Test")
  &&
  not(
    ([SharePoint Columns].[Workflow Status] == "Pending")
    ||
    contains([SharePoint Columns].[Workflow Status], "Draft")
  )
)
